description: Style Notedunhill Black EDT is a woody aromatic fragrance that was launched in 2008. It's bottled in a sedate and conservative flacon of heavy glass.Product DetailsThe top note is nettles with heart note of lavender and jasmine. The base consists of notes of suede, guaiac wood and virginia cedar.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
